title: Figma learning lab: unlocking speed and visual expression with generative plugins and shader effects
speakers: Hugo Raymond (Designer Advocate, Figma), Mallory Dean (Designer Advocate, Figma)
key_points: Introduces new ways to bring visual expression, consistency, and speed into the design workflow using generative effects and shader effects.
Framed as a 'learning lab' session, with an invitation to continue afterward in the Learning Lab Lounge for informal time with the Figma team.
